opportunity.title: Ship goal-based AI optimization
opportunity.thesis: Buyers now expect goal → optimize. Creative strength needs a decisioning layer.
opportunity.whyItMatters: TTD / StackAdapt / DV360 are resetting the AI-DSP narrative.
opportunity.move: Closed beta: goal → format/placement optimizer for high-impact units.
opportunity.expectedImpact: Defend budgets shifting to “AI DSP” stories.
recommendedActions: Publish public case proof in 90 days

evidence.title: Trade Desk hiring 12 ML Engineers for “Kokai Decisioning”
evidence.summary: Cluster of senior ML roles referencing real-time decisioning, feature stores, and advertiser goal translation—signals continued Kokai investment.
evidence.rawExcerpt: Build and productionize models that translate advertiser objectives into bid / budget decisions within the Kokai platform…

evidence.title: StackAdapt launches “AdaptAI Creative Studio” beta
evidence.summary: Self-serve generative creative with performance prediction for display and CTV—signals a chance for Kargo to productize format-native generation.
evidence.rawExcerpt: AdaptAI Creative Studio lets marketers generate, score, and iterate ad variants with predicted attention and CTR…

evidence.title: TTD eng blog: “Feature store for real-time creative selection”
evidence.summary: Technical post confirms investment in low-latency creative ranking—blurs line between DSP optimization and creative intelligence.
evidence.rawExcerpt: We describe a feature store that serves creative embeddings to bid-time models under 8ms p99…

evidence.title: DV360 “AI Max for Video” rolled to more markets
evidence.summary: Google expands automated video optimization; raises the bar for “set goals, get outcomes” buying experiences.
evidence.rawExcerpt: AI Max for Video now available in additional markets, using generative assets and automated targeting…

competitors.name: The Trade Desk
competitors.summary: Largest independent DSP pushing AI-driven optimization (Kokai) and identity (UID2) across CTV and open web.

competitors.name: StackAdapt
competitors.summary: Fast-growing full-funnel DSP investing heavily in AI creative tooling and self-serve mid-market expansion.

competitors.name: Google DV360
competitors.summary: Walled-garden + open inventory scale; AI Max and privacy changes reshape how brands buy outside Google.

learnings.title: Goal-in, optimize-out is table stakes
learnings.lesson: Kokai + public ML hiring show buyers expect AI to translate goals into bids.
learnings.quickWin: Ship a closed beta: brand goal → high-impact format/placement optimizer.

confidenceBreakdown.note: Public sources only. Confidence = corroboration across independent marked sources.
